title: Earthy Ukrainian Cabbage Bowl
description: A snappy, herbal date-night Ukrainian dish featuring shredded cabbage, smoked pork, and dill in a tandoor clay pot papillote.
instructions: Preheat your tandoor clay pot in the oven at 200 C for 10 minutes.
Heat olive oil in a skillet, add diced pork belly and cook until browned.
Add sliced onion and minced garlic to the pork, sauté until fragrant.
Transfer the pork mixture to a parchment sheet, add shredded cabbage, bay leaf, dill, lemon zest and juice, salt, pepper.
Tightly fold the parchment into a papillote, sealing the edges.
Place the papillote in the preheated tandoor pot and bake for 35 minutes.
Remove the pot from the oven and carefully open the papillote to release steam.
Serve the cabbage bowl hot, garnish with extra dill if desired.
Enjoy your earthy, moist Ukrainian cabbage bowl while it remains crisp and aromatic.
